TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kanikalan, title = kanikalan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kanikalan} }

S.FORM: kanikalan caayhen katahkal ku cilal i sananal.
S.PHON: kanikar~ɾan ʦaajħən kataħkar~ɾ ku ʦir~ɾar~ɾ i sananar~ɾ.
S.FORM: kanikalan caayhen katahkal ku cilal i sananal.
S.PHON: kanikar~ɾan ʦaajħən kataħkar~ɾ ku ʦir~ɾar~ɾ i sananar~ɾ.
